Class CachingExtension

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.plugins.caching.CachingExtension
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYSelectionListener, KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYGuiExtension.Settings, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine, KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar, ProofDisposedListener, RuleAppListener, ProverTaskListener
public class CachingExtension extends Object implements KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.StatusLine, KeYGuiExtension.Settings, KeYGuiExtension.Toolbar, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYSelectionListener, RuleAppListener, ProofDisposedListener, ProverTaskListener
Extension for proof caching.

    Class

    static class 
    CachingExtension.CopyBeforeDispose
    Listener that ensures steps are copied before the referenced proof is disposed.

    • getMainMenuActions

      public @NonNull List<Action> getMainMenuActions(@NonNull MainWindow mainWindow)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
      A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

      Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

      Specified by:
      getMainMenuActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
      Parameters:
      mainWindow - the window of the main menu
      Returns:
      non-null, emptiable list of actions.
      See Also:
      • KeyAction

    • selectedProofChanged

      public void selectedProofChanged(KeYSelectionEvent<Proof> e)
      Description copied from interface: KeYSelectionListener
      the selected proof has changed (e.g. a new proof has been loaded or selected in the UI)

      Do not modify the list of selection listeners in this callback!

      Specified by:
      selectedProofChanged in interface KeYSelectionListener
      Parameters:
      e - event with details about the new selection

      public @NonNull List<Action> getContextActions(@NonNull KeYMediator mediator, @NonNull ContextMenuKind kind, @NonNull Object underlyingObject)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
      A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

      Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

      Specified by:
      getContextActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
      Parameters:
      mediator - the window of the main menu
      kind - the type of context menu
      underlyingObject - the object for which the context menu is requested
      Returns:
      non-null, emptiable list of actions.

    • taskProgress

      public void taskProgress(int position)
      Description copied from interface: ProverTaskListener

      Called when progress is made on a task.

      This method is called after every single step of the task

      Specified by:
      taskProgress in interface ProverTaskListener
      Parameters:
      position - indicates how much work has been done relative to the value of size passed in ProverTaskListener.taskStarted(TaskStartedInfo).

    • taskFinished

      Description copied from interface: ProverTaskListener
      Called when a task is finished.

      info - a TaskFinishedInfo object with additional information
